items.name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” Brown/Small Red Heart
items.name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style вҖ” Brown/Small Red Heart
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-dyed linen consistent with ZPгҖҪпёҸ, then coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matteрҹӨҹ. The leather is top-grain calfskinрҹ‘ӣ flexible and non-irritatingрҹ’Ә. With custom hand-painted details, one bag offers three styles. items.name_en: Goyard Bowling New Washbag/Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
Goyard Bowling New Washbag/Shoulder Bag
A transformed washbag that is absolutely divine. The original version was handheld with only one buckle, making it easy to drop items when full. The new version features a double-buckle design for added security and a detachable shoulder strap, instantly turning it into a shoulder bag. It is surprisingly spacious yet lightweight, perfect for both commuting and dates~
Model: 5824
Dimensions: Base 25x12x12cm

Goyard Beluga Basket RedвҷҘпёҸ
The vintage large tote basket is now "born"!!
Sure enough, any bag looks cute when it shrinksрҹҘ°рҹҘ°
However, this is cute with a touch of ceremony
Because of these handles~the whole bag is elevated
Usually, the Beluga basket is open
The designer was thoughtful to add a drawstring pouch inside
A basket that can be closed gives peace of mind
I placed an order immediately after the agent posted the photo
This must be snatched up, a sure-fire hitрҹ”Ҙ
A hit requires speed and accuracy!
Otherwise, if you clash with someone else's bag, the one with the wrong version will be awkward
Our craftsmanship needs no explanation, buy with confidence and wear with confidence!
